message:
fix(fr-command): ZADD odd score/member tail returns syntax error [bd-frankenredis-zaddary]

ZADD's tail validation (after parsing option flags) was returning
CommandError::WrongArity when the remaining score/member count was
zero or odd. Upstream t_zset.c::zaddGenericCommand emits the
generic 'ERR syntax error' for this case via shared.syntaxerr.
Switched to CommandError::SyntaxError.

Verified upstream: 'ZADD z BAD 1 m' (3 trailing args after 'z')
returns 'ERR syntax error', not 'wrong number of arguments'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
